admin_database_description: Status and maintenance operations for the FHIR database.
admin_database_no_operations: No maintenance operations are available for the scopes granted to this session.
admin_database_rebuild_description: Rebuild the search index from the content already stored in the database.
admin_database_reset_description: Wipe the database store and reset the search index. This is a destructive operation.
admin_database_reset_dialog_message: This permanently deletes all FHIR resources and clears the search index. This action cannot be undone.
admin_import_link_description: Upload a ZIP archive of FHIR resources into the database.
home_about: Ignis is a platform for experimenting with FHIR (Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources). This project builds on Spark, an open-source FHIR server implementation.
import_description: Import FHIR resources into the database from a ZIP archive.
import_dropzone_label: Drag a ZIP archive here, or browse to select one.
import_reject_generic: That file can't be imported. Select a single ZIP archive.
import_reject_size: That file is too large. The maximum archive size is {size}.
import_reject_type: Only ZIP archives can be imported.
operations_subtitle: Live progress for long-running server operations.
session_expired_description: You need to log in again to continue.
session_warning_tip: Save any work before logging in again.
resources_capability_error: Could not load the FHIR server capability statement. Check that the FHIR API is reachable and try again.
resources_detail_empty: No resources found for this type.
resources_detail_error: Could not load resources for this type. Check that the FHIR API is reachable.
resources_instance_error: Could not load this resource. Check that the FHIR API is reachable.
resources_subtitle: Resource types declared by the FHIR server, with instance counts. Select a type to browse its instances.
